caption: The video captures a scene from what appears to be a community or educational event, possibly related to music or poetry, as indicated by the presence of a microphone and a book. A woman with short gray hair, wearing glasses, a turquoise sweater, and a colorful scarf stands in front of an audience, holding a booklet and speaking. To her right, a man in a white shirt and black vest is seated, attentively listening and clapping his hands together. The audience, consisting of people with various hairstyles and attire, is seated facing the speakers. The setting includes wooden blinds in the background, suggesting an indoor venue like a classroom or conference room. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, hinting at the organization or theme of the event.
